context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the security-essentials instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY security-sensitive code.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Sensitive data in logs** — passwords, tokens, API keys, and PII must never appear in logs → [Sensitive Data in Logs](#sensitive-data-in-logs)

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Sobelow in CI** — `mix sobelow` must pass in CI; fail on any HIGH or CRITICAL finding

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Identify attack surface** — list all user inputs, external data sources, and network boundaries

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run `mix sobelow --router MyAppWeb.Router`** — static analysis on your router and controllers

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run `mix sobelow --private`** — check private functions for vulnerabilities

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Review findings by severity** — HIGH severity first, then MEDIUM, then LOW

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run full audit** — `mix deps.audit && mix hex.audit && mix sobelow` before merging

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Interpretation:** Any Sobelow finding of HIGH or CRITICAL severity MUST be fixed before merging. LOW findings should be tracked and addressed within 2 sprints.

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Never disable Phoenix's built-in CSRF protection.
